title: Subjugation of Sriluur

The '''Subjugation of Sriluur''' occurred in [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]], in which the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] invaded and conquered the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Sriluur/Legends|Sriluur]].<ref name="GatORW" />

Shortly after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]],<ref name="GatORW" /> Imperial forces entered the city of [[Dnalvec]], known for its important [[Dnalvec Militia|militia]],<ref name="TGWH" /> and effectively ended the long-lasting [[Houk–Weequay conflicts]].<ref name="TCSWE">''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''</ref> The Empire established a presence on the planet, first to put an end to smuggling and [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] activity in the [[Periphery/Legends|Periphery]], but also in order to weaken the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutts]] that controlled the region.<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref> The Empire established [[Garrison/Legends|garrisons]] in the industrial capital [[Meirm City]] and along the [[Copper Coast]].<ref name="TGWH" />

The world was turned as a staging area for the distribution of the region's raw materials bound for [[Kuat Drive Yards/Legends|Kuat Drive Yards]]. The nearby [[Ka'Dedus system/Legends|Ka'Dedus]] and [[Verde system/Legends|Verde systems]] were heavily mined and Sriluur was the most accessible waypoint to the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]].<ref name="GatORW" /> In the aftermath of the annexation, some disgusted Weequay, including veteran [[Adazian Liebke]], left Sriluur and joined the Rebel Alliance.<ref name="TGWH" />
